result.stderr:
CFPagesDeploy 1.0.3-alpha+cf3effd3bb
Copyright (c) 2024 - ConnX Business Solutions Ltd.

  -c, --configuration    Build Configuration

  -r, --runtime          Runtime

  -p, --project          Required. The name of the Cloudflare Pages Project

  -d, --domain           Attempts to attach the Cloudflare Pages Deployment to
                         this domain

  -i, --input            Required. A directory containing files to upload

  -y, --yes              Answer yes to any questions

  -s, --silent           Runs the tool in silent mode (produces no output)

  -e, --email            The Cloudflare email address to use when making API
                         requests (use with key)

  -k, --key              The Cloudflare key to use when making API requests (use
                         with email)

  -t, --token            The Cloudflare token to use when making API requests
                         (use instead of email and key)

  -a, --account          The Cloudflare account Id to use for API requests.

  -b, --branch           (Default: main) The branch to use when creating the
                         deployment

  --help                 Display this help screen.

  --version              Display version information.
